title: iria vahlii
intro: Iria vahlii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, commonly found in the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Iria vahlii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Iria vahlii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
